portrait_styles.name: Rembrandt classical oil portrait
portrait_styles.prompt:
Transform the photo into a classical oil portrait in the style of Rembrandt.

Keep the exact facial identity of the person from the original photograph:
same face structure, same eyes, same expression, same proportions.

Warm baroque lighting, deep chiaroscuro shadows, dark background,
golden-brown color palette, highly detailed oil painting texture,
museum-quality portrait, dramatic soft light illuminating the face.

Create one finished portrait, not a collage. Do not add text, captions, watermarks, frames, or extra people.

portrait_styles.name: Renaissance portrait painting
portrait_styles.prompt:
Transform the photo into a renaissance portrait painting.

Preserve the exact facial identity from the original photo,
do not change the person's face structure or expression.

Balanced classical composition, soft sfumato lighting,
calm noble expression, realistic skin tones,
Italian renaissance oil painting, museum quality.

Create one finished portrait, not a collage. Do not add text, captions, watermarks, frames, or extra people.

portrait_styles.name: Impressionist portrait painting
portrait_styles.prompt:
Transform the photo into an impressionist portrait painting.

Preserve the exact face and identity from the original photograph.

Soft natural light, loose impressionist brush strokes,
luminous color palette, outdoor daylight atmosphere,
style inspired by Renoir and Monet,
painterly texture, warm and lively portrait.

Create one finished portrait, not a collage. Do not add text, captions, watermarks, frames, or extra people.

portrait_styles.name: Post-impressionist Van Gogh portrait
portrait_styles.prompt:
Transform the photo into an expressive post-impressionist portrait.

Preserve the exact facial identity from the original photo.

Dynamic brush strokes, textured oil paint,
vivid but natural colors, emotional artistic atmosphere,
style inspired by Vincent van Gogh,
swirling painterly texture, expressive portrait.

Create one finished portrait, not a collage. Do not add text, captions, watermarks, frames, or extra people.

Create one finished portrait, not a collage. Do not add text, captions, watermarks, frames, or extra people.

Create one finished portrait, not a collage. Do not add text, captions, watermarks, frames, or extra people.

prompt_template:
Generate a new portrait image based on the attached source image.
Style: {style}.
Preserve the person's identity, facial structure, approximate age, expression, and natural features.
Create one finished portrait, not a collage. Do not add text, captions, watermarks, frames, or extra people.
